## What's changed



## 🐛 Bug Fixes

- **release**: Keep scoped chore commits in changelog (0.4.64)(9904e1b)


---

**Installation (plugin)**
1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`
2. Place in `{vault}/.obsidian/plugins/remote-ssh/`
3. Enable the plugin in Obsidian → Settings → Community Plugins

**Server daemon (Phase D-δ / F24)**

Pre-built daemon binaries for Linux + macOS on amd64 / arm64
are attached. Each binary ships with a `.bundle` file
containing a Sigstore (cosign) keyless signature; verify
independently with the cosign CLI:

```bash
cosign verify-blob \
  --bundle obsidian-remote-server-linux-amd64.bundle \
  --certificate-identity-regexp 'https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/.github/workflows/release.yml@.*' \
  --certificate-oidc-issuer https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com \
  obsidian-remote-server-linux-amd64
```

`daemon-manifest.json` (also signed) lists the sha256 of
every binary in this release for at-a-glance pinning.

The plugin's `ServerDeployer` performs the local-side
sha256 verification (Phase D-δ.1 / F23) automatically on
every deploy. Bundle-based cosign verification on the
plugin side will land in a follow-up.

releases.description:
## What's Changed
* ci: production-ready GitHub workflow suite by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/1
* build(deps): bump actions/upload-artifact from 4 to 7 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/2
* build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/4
* build(deps): bump actions/labeler from 5 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/3
* build(deps): bump github/codeql-action from 3 to 4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/5
* build(deps-dev): bump esbuild from 0.24.2 to 0.28.0 in the dev-deps group by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/6
* build(deps-dev): bump typescript from 5.9.3 to 6.0.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/7
* build(deps-dev): bump @vitest/coverage-v8 from 2.1.9 to 4.1.5 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/8
* build(deps): bump actions/setup-node from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/10
* build(deps): bump codecov/codecov-action from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/11
* feat: v0.3 — Pro gates, JumpHostTunnel, multi-profile ConnectModal by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/9
* build(deps): bump softprops/action-gh-release from 2 to 3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/12
* feat: v0.4 — SecretStore, rename optimization, followSymlinks, v0.2.0 by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/13
* feat: import SSH profiles from ~/.ssh/config by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/14
* feat: add observability infra and dev tooling by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/15
* chore: strip sync engine, license gate, and conflict UI by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/16
* feat: introduce SftpClient and exercise it from connect by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/17
* fix: normalize ~/ in remote paths before sending to SFTP by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/18
* feat: add ReadCache and DirCache for the upcoming adapter by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/19
* feat: add SftpDataAdapter (read-side) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/20
* feat: add AdapterPatcher and opt-in adapter swap (read-side) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/21
* feat: implement SftpDataAdapter write side and fs ops by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/22
* fix: stale activeProfileId on reload, and mkdir over existing dir by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/23
* chore: monorepo restructure (plugin/ + server/ + proto/) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/24
* feat: define JSON-RPC protocol (proto/, plugin TS, server Go) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/27
* feat(server): skeleton with framing, dispatcher, auth, server.info by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/28
* build(deps-dev): bump @types/node from 20.19.39 to 25.6.0 in /plugin by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/26
* build(deps-dev): bump eslint from 9.39.4 to 10.2.1 in /plugin by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/25
* feat(server): read-side fs handlers (stat/exists/list/readText/readBinary) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/29
* feat(server): write-side fs handlers (write / append / mkdir / rename / copy / trash) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/30
* feat(plugin): RpcClient + RpcRemoteFsClient transport layer by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/31
* refactor(plugin): SftpDataAdapter talks to RemoteFsClient, not SftpClient by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/32
* feat(plugin): SSH-tunnelled RPC handshake + debug command by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/33
* feat(plugin): auto-deploy obsidian-remote-server over SSH by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/34
* feat(plugin): per-profile RPC transport, auto-deployed on connect by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/35
* feat(plugin): per-client path mapping (PathMapper) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/36
* feat(server): fs.watch / fs.unwatch + push notifications by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/37
* feat(plugin): subscribe to daemon fs.watch on adapter patch by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/38
* feat(plugin): reconcile vault on remote create/delete/rename by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/39
* feat(plugin): ResourceBridge for serving remote binaries (Phase 5-F) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/40
* fix(server): TestServer_WatchPipeline writer-goroutine race by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/41
* feat(plugin): auto-reconnect with backoff (Phase 4-K.1) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/42
* feat(plugin): reconnect-aware adapter gate + cancel + settings (Phase 4-K.2) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/43
* feat(plugin): clientId + userName in settings (F19/F20) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/44
* feat(plugin): Range request support in ResourceBridge (Phase 6-B) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/45
* feat(plugin): auto-patch adapter on connect (Tier 1-A) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/46
* docs: rewrite README for current plugin (Tier 1-B(1)) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/47
* docs: plugin compatibility matrix (Tier 1-B(2)) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/48
* feat(plugin): richer ssh_config parser + ProfileForm refresh (Tier 2-A) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/49
* feat(plugin): harden + test JumpHostTunnel (Tier 2-B) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/50
* feat(plugin): write-conflict detection via expectedMtime (Tier 2-C) by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/51
* fix(plugin): reconcile vault root on patch / restore by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/52
* chore(ci): version-check + auto-release-on-merge + 0.3.0 bump by @sotashimozono in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/53

## New Contributors
* @sotashimozono made their first contribution in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/1
* @dependabot[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/pull/2

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/sotashimozono/obsidian-remote-ssh/commits/0.3.0
